scenes.title: Anger: A Leader's Challenge
scenes.illustration_description: A frustrated, red-faced stick figure leader with steam rising from their head, standing in front of a group of slightly slumped stick figures representing a disheartened team. A thought bubble above the leader shows a broken gavel or a crashing graph.
scenes.narration: In the corporate world, a leader's emotions can powerfully shape the entire team's environment. Uncontrolled anger isn't just a personal issue; it directly impacts morale, productivity, and the quality of strategic decisions.

illustration_elements.description: Stick figure leader with aggressive posture and red face
Steam lines rising from leader's head
Three slightly slumped stick figures as team members
Bubble with a broken gavel or downward arrow graph

scenes.title: Spot Your *Triggers*
scenes.illustration_description: A large question mark icon next to a thought bubble emerging from a simple head outline. Inside the thought bubble are small sketches of common corporate stressors: a clock for deadlines, a broken handshake for betrayal, a '$-' sign for financial pressure, and a '!' for unexpected changes.
scenes.narration: The first step to managing anger is understanding its roots. Take time to identify your personal 'triggers'—those specific situations, stresses, or unmet expectations that consistently ignite your frustration.

scenes.title: *Pause*, Don't React
scenes.illustration_description: A stick figure person meditating calmly in a cross-legged position, with a serene expression. Above their head, a thought bubble contains a large, clear 'STOP' sign. Subtle 'breathe' lines around them.
scenes.narration: When a trigger strikes, your immediate impulse might be to react. Instead, cultivate the 'pause and process' technique: take a deep breath, count to ten, and gain a moment of perspective before you respond.

elements.description: Stick figure meditating in lotus position with arms resting on knees
Elongated oval cushion with internal hatch lines
Cloud-shaped thought bubble outline
Octagonal frame for the STOP sign
Curved motion lines near shoulders and hips
Stick figure meditating in lotus position with arms resting on knees
Elongated oval cushion with internal hatch lines
Cloud-shaped thought bubble outline
Octagonal frame for the STOP sign
Curved motion lines near shoulders and hips

scenes.title: *Express* Not Explode
scenes.illustration_description: Two distinct speech bubbles. On the left, a jagged, aggressive speech bubble with 'YOU ALWAYS!' in bold, angry text. On the right, a smooth, calm speech bubble with 'I feel...' and 'I need...' in clear, neutral text. A dividing line separates the two bubbles.
scenes.narration: Once you've paused, focus on expressing your feelings constructively. Avoid blaming others with 'you' statements, and instead use 'I' statements to clearly articulate your emotions and needs without aggression.

illustration_elements.description: Jagged, aggressive speech bubble on left
Smooth, calm speech bubble on right
'I feel...' and 'I need...' inside calm bubble

scenes.title: Build *Resilience*
scenes.illustration_description: A stylized brain icon with gears and growth sprouts emerging from it, symbolizing emotional intelligence and development. Below it, a small weight or a 'zen' symbol (e.g., a simple lotus flower) to represent self-care.
scenes.narration: For long-term success, focus on building your emotional resilience. This involves continually developing your emotional intelligence skills, understanding your own and others' emotions, and making self-care a non-negotiable part of your routine.

illustration_elements.description: Growth sprouts emerging from the brain
Small lotus flower icon for self-care

scenes.title: Lead with *Calm*
scenes.illustration_description: A confident, calm stick figure leader standing tall, with an upward-pointing arrow and a handshake symbol indicating positive impact. Around the leader are smiling, collaborative stick figures, forming a positive team circle.
scenes.narration: By mastering anger management, you transform into a leader who inspires trust, fosters open collaboration, and proactively shapes a positive, productive corporate culture. Lead with calm, and watch your influence grow.

illustration_elements.description: Confident stick figure leader with a serene expression
Smiling, collaborative stick figures in a circle around the leader
